# Report of news

Daily synthesized reports of news items processed from `raw/news/`.

**Naming:** `NNN - YYYY-MM-DD.md` (3-digit zero-padded sequence, never resets).
**Template:** `_templates/report-news.md`
**Generated by:** AI agent per AGENTS.md §4 + §7.

Grouped internally by:
1. Top headline of the day
2. Vietnam Macro News
3. Vietnam Enterprise News (subdivided by industry)
4. Global Macro News
5. Global Enterprise News

Each item carries: opening (topic sentence), detail, implications, sources, wiki link.
